title: crepis polymorpha var. pinnatifida
intro: Crepis polymorpha var. pinnatifida, also known as the variegated hawksbeard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crepis polymorpha var. pinnatifida include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
